chapter_title.en: Ruin from excessive love or hatred of Amīr al-mu’minīn

text: ١١٧. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): هَلَكَ فِيَّ رَجُلَانِ مُحِبٌّ غَالٍ وَمُبْغِضٌ قَالٍ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 117. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Two categories of persons will face ruin on account of me: he who loves me with exaggeration, and he who hates me intensely.
